70010000091815.description:
A murdered drifter awakens- alive again, seconds before his death. Hunted and haunted, help him untangle a mad web of conspiracy in this fast-paced point 'n click thrill-ride.

FEATURES

• A Pulp Adventure Thriller from the minds that brought you Crawl.
• An engrossing roller-coaster of a story- Drawing on King, Crichton and Carpenter, with a dash of 70s Aussie grindhouse.
• Unique twin-stick controls built ground up for both handheld and couch play.
• Bursting with raw crunchy pixel art and high-impact animation.
• Professionally voice acted, with a brooding dark-synth cinematic score.
			
SYNOPSIS

Mick Carter's been drifting a while now- moving from job to job, never staying one place long. Jumping a box-car to his old home town, he witnesses a violent murder, is pursued by hi-tech soldiers, thrown in a reservoir and drowned.

And that's just the start of Mick's problems.

His consciousness ripped away, thrust back into his own body seconds before his death...

Framed for the killing he witnessed, tormented by his own past, and haunted by the feeling that something followed him back from the other side...

Follow Mick as he's sucked headfirst into a lunatic web of shadowy corporations, murder, and the thousand-year obsession of a madman.

GAMEPLAY

The Drifter is our take on a classic 2d point and click adventure- with the brake-lines cut. The focus is on fast-paced storytelling, with puzzle-solving being the glue that ties it together. Mick's a practical guy, and so puzzles are down-to-earth too, designed to be unobtrusive, and give an investigative feel.

We're keeping the pacing quick and lean, you'll never be wandering around lost or confused- Mick is propelled through the story at a good clip, from one situation to another, with barely a moment to catch his breath. One minute you'll be crafting a Molotov cocktail from a bottle of over-proof rum, the next interrogating a crooked neurosurgeon before swinging from a high-rise window by a fraying extension lead.
70010000091815.name: The Drifter

70010000099149.description:
Set forth on your quest to [INSERT GOAL HERE] with one of the worthy yet quirky heroes in solo or cooperative play, local and online. Hack, slash, and dodge through hordes of enemies and deadly traps in procedurally generated runs of hand-crafted rooms and levels using each hero's unique attacks and abilities to your advantage.

Sharp reflexes and split-second decisions are crucial to survival as the intensity ratchets up as each run delivers new surprises, branching paths, and unrelenting bosses to conquer. Gobble up coins to spend at Bruce & Goose's Shoppe as you take a breath from the action to gain new perks, devastating attacks and summoned allies. Stack them right, and you'll unleash screen-filling destruction of arcade legend.

Keep an eye out for secrets among the chaos as this land holds many mysteries with new paths and locations, new heroes to rescue and add to your roster, and more…

Double Trouble
Charge forth alone or bring a co-op buddy to tackle dungeons together, combine powerful attacks and revive one another if you fall in battle.

Choose Your Own Adventure
Each run offers hand-crafted screens, unique bosses, and evolving routes shaped by player choices and quests.

Rogue's Gallery
Unlock nine distinctive heroes with unique skills, side objectives, and customizable trinkets that alter gameplay.

Arcade Alchemy
Chain perks and elemental powers through combat performance for explosive, high-reward playstyles.
70010000099149.intro: Dark Scrolls is a fantasy-themed action platformer that fuses shmup-style chaos with roguelite progression and is packed with charm, challenge, and secrets.
70010000099149.name: Dark Scrolls

70050000074171.description: Delve into the thrilling world of The Drifter on Nintendo Switch™ 2.
70050000074171.intro: A pulp adventure thriller – Enhanced for Nintendo Switch™ 2!
70050000074171.name: The Drifter – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000092407.description:
Deer & Boy is a narrative cinematic adventure that tells a silent story through stunning visuals and evocative music.

With no dialogue to distract, every moment speaks directly to the heart, making it accessible to players of all ages and backgrounds.
A warm and poetic journey to rediscover wonder. An animated film you can play!

A runaway boy meets a fragile fawn. Experience their silent bond through stunning visuals and music in this poetic cinematic adventure that speaks directly to the heart.

An Original and Evolving Adventure

Your companion grows from vulnerable fawn to majestic deer, changing how you play together. Protect your fragile friend early on, then work as equals with evolving abilities.

A Story for Everyone

Young players will see a beautiful friendship between a boy and his deer. Adult players may discover deeper themes about healing and finding strength through companionship. Everyone finds their own meaning in this contemplative experience.

Deer & Boy offers understanding layers that make it perfect for solo play or sharing with family.

KEY FEATURES
Silent Storytelling: No dialogue. Pure visual and musical emotion
Evolving Companion: The animal will gradually grow throughout the story and will become an essential and protective companion.
Play An Animated Film: Cinematic adventure with breathtaking art direction.
Engaging puzzles: Clever challenges integrated into your journey. Cinematic Adventure: Beautiful 3D environments with movie-like presentation
Family-Friendly: Suitable for all ages with no graphic violence or complex text
Complete Journey: A complete adventure you can finish in a few play sessions

"A single-player game where you're never alone."

Experience a unique cinematic adventure where an animal truly grows up alongside you, bringing invaluable support during your journey through a world of wonder, challenge, and hope.
70010000092407.intro: A runaway boy meets a fawn in this poetic cinematic adventure where silence speaks louder than words and growing up changes everything.
70010000092407.name: Deer & Boy

70010000109770.description:
Take a deeper look into the world of Deer&Boy with its 60 pages of exclusive artworks and behind-the-scenes information about Deer & Boy's creation.

Spoiler alert! This product contains some spoilers regarding Deer & Boy.

The complete official soundtrack of Deer & Boy. Listen to Corentin Brasart's stunning 53-track composition score.

Total length: 1h58 minutes

Solve a mini puzzle while listening to the Deer & Boy soundtrack
70010000109770.intro: Explore Deer & Boy's world with its Digital Artbook.
70010000109770.name: The Art of Deer & Boy

70010000114419.description:
Wanderstop is a narrative-centric cozy game about change and tea. Playing as a fallen fighter named Alta, you’ll manage a tea shop within a magical forest and tend to the customers who pass through. But Alta does not want to be here. And if she gets her way, the tea shop will be nothing but a brief and painful memory.
 
 
 Wanderstop is a tea shop management ritual. Grow and harvest the ingredients needed for tea, and then mix them together in an unusual tea-making contraption. Along the way, speak with the many travelers who pass through the shop, learn their stories and make tea that’s just right for them.
 
 In your downtime, you might tidy up around the clearing, decorate the shop in your style, or just sit on a bench with a cup of tea and listen to your own thoughts. Maybe doing nothing at all is okay. The shop demands patience, it rejects those who have come only in the pursuit of growth unchecked.
 
 And that’s why Alta can’t be here. It’s why she’ll never make it. This isn’t who she is. No, she’s a fighter! Why would anyone insist on turning the world’s greatest championship warrior into a docile shopkeeper?! With everything she’s capable of?? No no no, she won’t, she won’t do it... she can’t…
 
 Wanderstop is a game from the team at Ivy Road, including Davey Wreden (creator of The Stanley Parable and The Beginner’s Guide), Karla Zimonja (co-creator of Gone Home and Tacoma) and Daniel “C418” Rosenfeld (the music of Minecraft).
70010000114419.intro: A narrative-centric cozy game about change and tea
70010000114419.name: Wanderstop

70010000121346.description:
Hit the road and build your path as a professional truck driver in a world driven by delivery, precision, and control. Truck Simulator Driver 2026 puts you behind the wheel of powerful trucks, where every journey is a new challenge and every delivery depends on your skills.

Take on a wide range of transport missions, from standard cargo to heavy and oversized loads that require careful handling. Plan your routes, stay focused on the road, and make sure every delivery reaches its destination safely and on time.

Explore diverse environments with long highways, narrow roads, and demanding routes that push your control and decision-making. Each trip requires attention and the ability to adapt your driving style depending on the cargo and conditions.

Customize your trucks to match your preferences. Improve performance, upgrade parts, and prepare your vehicle for more complex deliveries as you progress.
Manage essential elements like fuel and timing. Plan your stops, stay efficient, and keep your deliveries on track without delays.


Key Features:
- Realistic truck driving experience
- Delivery missions with different cargo types
- Vehicle customization and upgrades
- Resource management during long routes
- Diverse roads and driving conditions
- Progressive gameplay with increasing challenges

Drive further. Deliver better. Stay in control.
70010000121346.name: Truck Simulator Driver 2026

70010000123697.description:
CO-OP ADVENTURE
Buddy up online or locally in this two-player co-op adventure! Test your teamwork as you swing, scale, and navigate the home of an unhinged teenager. Learn to co-operate... or probably just rage quit. Has your friendship got what it takes?

CLIMB. FALL. REPEAT.
Conquer challenging, physics-based climbing where every grab, swing, and slip could be your last. Miss a jump and it’s back to the floor, but isn’t falling half the fun?

ESCAPE THE HAND-TAGONIST
What’s up with this sadistic kid with too much time on his hands? Chopped doll heads? Mutilated toys? Just when you think you’re getting somewhere, he’ll pop up and squash your hopes of escape.

THE HOME STRETCH
Explore a full-scale house. Six rooms, each packed with unique hazards, interactive objects, and increasingly unfair level design. Throwback to the 90s with retro toys, nostalgic tunes, and enough chaos to mend your childhood trauma.

P.S. If you don’t escape the attic you’re trash.
70010000123697.intro: A co-op climbing game about two stuck-together toys on an escape mission from their evil owner.
70010000123697.name: Stuck Together

70010000124092.description:
Step into the role of a dedicated law enforcement officer in Tow Truck Police Simulator, where maintaining order on the streets is entirely in your hands. Patrol a living, breathing city filled with traffic violations, and take action with precision and authority. Every call is a new challenge—every decision shapes your reputation as you work to keep the roads clear and the city moving.

Features:
• Realistic towing mechanics with detailed truck physics, weight balance, and precise control systems.
• Advanced violation detection system with dynamic scenarios and decision-based outcomes.
• Multiple tow truck types, including medium and heavy-duty vehicles with unique handling characteristics.
• Interactive towing tools and equipment for complex recovery operations.
• Vehicle customization and upgrade system affecting performance and efficiency.
• Reputation and reward system tied to accuracy, speed, and professional conduct.
• Diverse urban environments with tight streets, heavy traffic, and evolving conditions.



Enforce the rules, clear the streets, and rise through the ranks in a city that depends on your skills. In Tow Truck Police Simulator, it’s not just about towing—it’s about control, responsibility, and mastering every situation. Prove you have what it takes to become the ultimate authority on the road.
70010000124092.intro: Command the fleet that keeps the city moving.
70010000124092.name: Tow Truck Police Simulator
70010000124092.publisher: Lu Ming trading as Shane Game

70050000071215.description:
Bring the heroic world of Shovel Knight to your UNO™ matches!

This cosmetic pack of 10 exclusive items transforms your game space with pixel-perfect art, a chiptune soundtrack, and iconic characters straight from the legendary 8-bit style action-adventure game.

Equip the full set or mix and match your favorite relics to create a play space worthy of a true hero!

The Shovel Knight Cosmetic Pack includes:
• 1 game board: A 3D pixel art scene where players gather around a warm campfire deep in the woods.
• 1 card deck: 16 unique designs, each showcasing fan-favorite faces from the Shovel Knight universe.
• 1 chiptune music track: A beloved theme from Shovel Knight’s soundtrack.
• 4 avatars: Portraits of 4 iconic characters.
• 1 avatar frame.
• 1 shiny Action/Wild Card visual effect.
• 1 stylized “UNO!” call to match the mood.

This pack is purely cosmetic and does not affect gameplay.
70050000071215.name: UNO™ - Shovel Knight Theme

70070000035764.description:
In this poetic cinematic platformer, a runaway boy meets a fawn. As their bond grows, so do their abilities and the emotional weight of their journey, where silence speaks louder than words.

The Deluxe Edition includes:
- Deer & Boy
- Deer & Boy - Artbook

Spoiler alert! This product contains some spoilers regarding Deer & Boy's story.
70070000035764.intro: The Deluxe Edition includes Deer & Boy, its Artbook and its OST.
70070000035764.name: Deer & Boy - Deluxe Edition

70010000083071.description:
◆ Welcome to Mousebusters!
You just moved into your new place, and are excited to settle in…when all of a sudden, you get turned into a mouse! Thankfully, you soon meet a fellow rodent who knows how to help.
He asks you to call him “Chief,” and explains that there’s only one way to break the curse: by ridding the whole apartment building of the ghosts that haunt its inhabitants!

◆ Get to Know Your New Neighbors
In each apartment, you'll find a different ghost—but it won't be that easy to track them down. It seems they prey on negative emotions, so in order to smoke them out, you'll have to do some major recon to figure out each resident's biggest insecurities. Just don't get caught!

◆ A Partner You Can Count On
Luckily, you won't have to go it alone, because you'll be in frequent contact with the Chief throughout each mission. From his comfy desk at HQ, he'll offer plenty of guidance and comedic commentary as you scour the building and solve puzzles to find each ghost.

◆ Engage in Ghost-Zapping Action!
Once you've tracked down the source of each resident's woes, you'll have to whip out your trusty ray gun and perform a good ol' fashioned exorcism. Protect yourself from projectiles while targeting their weak points to expose their spectral cores!

◆ Venture Down the Rabbit Hole
Over the course of your investigations, you'll slowly uncover more and more evidence that suggests something far more ominous is going on with this building...and it seems the Chief knows more about the curse than he's letting on. Just how deep does this conspiracy go?
70010000083071.intro: Explore a haunted apartment building to save its cute and quirky residents in this pint-sized pixel adventure!
70010000083071.name: Mousebusters

70010000123096.description:
Join VTuber Mitako's cursed village livestream, chat along as First-Time Hitto, and watch a goofy occult trip spiral into ritual horror.

Mitako is live, loud, and ready to turn a trip to Shimofuri Village into content.

As First-Time Hitto (a fresh face in her chat), you are not just watching from the sidelines — you are in the chat, choosing comments, reacting with regulars like Occult Sukio and Saw-the-Worst Mitazou, and helping shape the mood of the stream.

The deeper Mitako digs into the rumors haunting Shimofuri Village, the more the livestream begins to feel like a movie you cannot look away from.
Keep the chat moving, enjoy the banter, and slowly realize what kind of rules the village has been living by.

A chat-style visual novel blending VTuber energy, Japanese occult comedy, and slow-burn horror.

- Play as a viewer inside Mitako's livestream chat — your comments shape the stream.
- Follow a chaotic VTuber trip into Shimofuri Village.
- A descent from casual chat comedy to creeping folkloric horror.
- Meet Mitako, Pero, Occult Sukio, Saw-the-Worst Mitazou, and the unsettling people of Shimofuri Village.
70010000123096.intro:
She wanted to go viral — she got something worse.
Some streams should never go live.
A VTuber horror you won't unsee.
70010000123096.name: Mitako Tatatari's Cult Village Stream ZP

70010000123262.description:
Weird science and block-pushing puzzle mechanics combine for a brainteasing adventure in Rat Protocol!

When an experiment unexpectedly grants humanoid strength and intelligence to a lab rat, the scientists in charge decide to test the limits of their creation’s newfound abilities. Guide the lab rat through increasingly tricky chambers by pushing crates, blocking dangerous laser beams, activating switches and detonating explosives. Find the right order to clear obstacles so the lab rat can reach key cards to open doorways and proceed to the next test. 

Will you make the experiment a success or lead your rodent to an untimely demise?

• Test the limits of a mutated lab rat in top-down puzzle adventure style!
• Solve increasingly complex puzzles to escape each tricky chamber.
• Avoid hazards and collect key cards to help the lab rat survive!
• Block laser beams, activate switches, push crates and more in the correct order.
• Enjoy retro pixel art aesthetics and a whimsical narrative about twisted science!
70010000123262.intro: Escape dangerous labs as a mutated rodent in a pushing puzzle adventure about twisted experiments!
70010000123262.name: Rat Protocol

70010000103345.description:
SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim is an adventure game set in 2000s Japan about the lives of Saeko, a girl with mysterious abilities, and the little people she has shrunk to the size of her thumb. Experience Saeko's and the little people's fates in the day and at night, through two separate game systems with different art styles.

You are Rin, the latest addition to the little people. Under Saeko’s protection, you spend your days in her desk drawer together with the other little people.
But don't let your guard down. Saeko has some...interesting hobbies, to say the least.

・Stunning and unique visuals drawn in two different styles of pixel art
・A world filled with brutal allure inspired by many strange tales, beginning with Fueti Shizue’s work
・An original game system which forces players to make difficult choices and live with the consequences
・A soundtrack heavily influenced by future garage and breakcore, composed by the developer himself
・The deepest journey into a developer’s proclivities in indie game history
70010000103345.intro: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you...
70010000103345.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim

70010000110112.description:
Mini Airways is a real-time management game with an air traffic control theme.
You will play as a busy air traffic controller in the game: directing planes to take off and land, clearing air traffic, upgrading airspace ...... And most of all, don't let them crash!

Real-TimeATC
Fast-paced, real-time ATC gameplay: Manage airspace, clear planes for takeoff and landing, and avoid near misses! In addition to the normal arrangement of takeoffs and landings, you also need to face the challenges of mountains, no-fly zones, and peak landing hours, so please concentrate!

Upgrade Your Airspace
Every time you finish one day's management, you will be able to pick an upgrade for your airspace and airport: auto holding, accelerating turns, increasing airspace, waypoints ...... upgrade and customize airports to keep flights running more smoothly.

Distinctive Global Maps
As you increase your flight management records, you will gradually unlock a total of 19 airspace maps based on real-world airports—from Beijing Capital, Shanghai Hongqiao, Chengdu Shuangliu in China to Vancouver, New York in North America, and then to London, Amsterdam in Europe... Showcase your air traffic control skills across various global airports!

Surprise Random Events
The game triggers random events under certain specific maps and conditions, featuring classic moments in aviation history: the miracle landing on the Hudson River, Air Force One crossing, emergency incidents, high-priority flights, etc.

Three Selectable Modes
The game offers three modes: Classic, Hardcore, and Sandbox.
In Hardcore mode, the airspace simulates real ATC operations without the ability to pause within the session;
In Sandbox mode, players have full control over waypoints, props, and landing intensity, allowing you to design their own waypoints and test the maximum flight density they can handle.

Custom Maps&Mods
The game supports creating custom maps and mods. Players can import map assets, freely configure runways, restricted areas, and other terrains for gameplay. For those with more demanding needs in aviation management, they can create MODs for altitude, wind speed, etc., enhancing the strategic depth of the game.

Play with your mates
Each airport can accommodate up to 4 people online. You can work with your friends to jointly manage the same airspace to reduce the impact of mistakes and challenge higher scores!
70010000110112.intro: Mini Airways is a real-time management game where you play the role of an air traffic controller. Clear your aircraft to takeoff & land, direct them to the destination.
70010000110112.name: Mini Airways

70010000111067.description:
Turn fitness into a fun, motivating, and interactive beach getaway.
Choose your personal trainer, select your level, and begin your custom fitness journey under the sun through structured workouts that keep you challenged and inspired. Each session combines 7 different exercises, performed for 1 minute 30 seconds with short 30-second breaks — repeated twice for a full 28-minute workout plus warm-up. With over 100 exercises, there are endless variations to keep every session fresh.

Build your personal training schedule across weeks or months, earn rewards for staying consistent, and watch your strength and endurance grow. Each trainer brings unique energy, voice, and encouragement to help you stay motivated.

Vibrant beach visuals, sun-drenched environments, and summery, pumping music transform every workout into a tropical fitness adventure. Whether you’re just starting out or chasing peak performance. This game will help you to stay active, healthy, and motivated long-term.
70010000111067.intro: Start your interactive beach fitness journey now.
70010000111067.name: GET FIT - Beach Girls

70010000111069.description:
Turn fitness into a fun, motivating, and interactive beach getaway.
Choose your personal trainer, select your level, and begin your custom fitness journey under the sun through structured workouts that keep you challenged and inspired. Each session combines 7 different exercises, performed for 1 minute 30 seconds with short 30-second breaks — repeated twice for a full 28-minute workout plus warm-up. With over 100 exercises, there are endless variations to keep every session fresh.

Build your personal training schedule across weeks or months, earn rewards for staying consistent, and watch your strength and endurance grow. Each trainer brings unique energy, voice, and encouragement to help you stay motivated.

Vibrant beach visuals, sun-drenched environments, and summery, pumping music transform every workout into a tropical fitness adventure. Whether you’re just starting out or chasing peak performance. This game will help you to stay active, healthy, and motivated long-term.
70010000111069.intro: Start your interactive beach fitness journey now.
70010000111069.name: GET FIT - Beach Boys

70010000114911.description:
MAMIYA - A Shared Illusion of the World's End - is a dark mystery visual novel made by the indie developer Kenkou Land.
Containing all three parts of the story, it lets you experience a world of characters guided by fate towards various conclusions.

●synopsis
Tokyo, during the year in which the world was prophesied to end.

As we clung to reality, too spineless to throw our lives away together, we met MAMIYA.

At a friend's funeral, the entire crowd was weeping and mourning, while we thought to ourselves that the death of a single person had no meaningful impact on the world at large.
We slept, woke up, and went through the same daily grind as ever. At least, that's how it was supposed to be.

Then MAMIYA appeared...

Before we even knew it, the mysterious child named MAMIYA had wormed their way into our daily lives. They slowly, but surely, became something of an emotional support. They'd brought us down a new path.

A path that would surely lead us to our deaths...

●Added Content
・Additional illustrations for the story!
・The long-awaited full voice acting!
As a voice actor, we have hired Soyogi-Soyogi !
・The Switch version also contains an original minigame to win "what-if" stories!
70010000114911.intro: It doesn't matter if my love goes unnoticed—I am always on your side.
70010000114911.name: MAMIYA - A Shared Illusion of the World's End -

70010000118454.description:
By day, they are symbols.

By night… they are something else.

The city worships them as fearless heroines: guardians of justice, icons of power, untouchable legends.
But when the lights fade and the masks come off, you discover a side no one else is allowed to see.

Strength. Doubt. Desire. Vulnerability.

Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroines Behind the Mask is a narrative-driven dating visual novel where your choices shape your relationship with powerful anime superheroines hiding more than just their identities.

Each heroine carries a double life.
A public symbol of perfection… and a private world filled with secrets, pressure, and temptation.

You’re not just another civilian.

You’re the one person who sees the woman behind the legend.

Will you earn her trust?
Will you protect her secret?
Or will passion blur the line between hero and something far more dangerous?


Features:

● POWERFUL HEROINE CAST: Meet anime superheroines with unique powers, personalities, and hidden weaknesses.

● SECRET IDENTITIES: Discover who they really are when the mask comes off.

● CHOICE-DRIVEN ROMANCE: Your decisions influence trust, intimacy, and destiny.

● MULTIPLE STORY ROUTES: Each heroine has branching paths and exclusive scenes.

● DIFFERENT ENDINGS: Romance, betrayal, obsession, redemption… or heartbreak.

● HIGH REPLAY VALUE: Unlock new dialogue, hidden moments, and alternate outcomes.


She fights villains in the shadows.

Will you be the one she lets in… after dark?
70010000118454.intro:
When the city sleeps, their secrets awaken.
Behind every mask… there’s a woman who could break you.
Will you uncover the truth or fall for the danger?
70010000118454.name: Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroines Behind the Mask

70010000119730.description:
Burn rubber, fire rockets, and survive the arena in this explosive combat racing experience.

RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme throws you into a post-apocalyptic world of armoured cars, deadly tracks, and all-out vehicular warfare. Every race is a battle where speed, firepower, and survival decide who rules the arena.

Play solo or challenge friends in local split-screen mode and prove who dominates the battlefield.

Pick from 21 unique cars, each with its own ultimate ability, upgrade path, and special body kits. Choose your class - SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, or CRUSHER - and master a wide arsenal of abilities, from rocket salvos and mini-missiles to teleport swaps, laser drones, flamethrowers, ghost summons, freezing blasts, and electric traps.

Race through 7 locations, face 5 unique bosses, and test your skills across Career, Event, Season, and Split-Screen modes. Every boss features distinct mechanics and attack patterns, from rocket barrages and enemy summons to teleport strikes, poison shots, and ice crystal traps.

With a variety of mission types and deep upgrade systems, every run offers a new way to dominate the road.

Event mode features tournaments built around specific cars, where you build your run by choosing skill cards between stages and survive with a single shared HP bar.

Season mode introduces daily challenges and leaderboards - complete missions, set records, and earn rewards.

Features:
• 20+ hours of combat racing in Career mode
• 21 unique cars with ultimate abilities
• 3 car classes: SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, CRUSHER
• 4 game modes: Career, Event, Season, Split-Screen
• 7 distinct locations and 5 unique bosses
• Wide range of weapons, abilities, and upgrades
• Local split-screen multiplayer on one console
70010000119730.intro: Jump into explosive combat racing where every track is a battlefield and every rival is a target.
70010000119730.name: RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme

70010000119812.description: Making a sandwich is not as easy as it seems. There are many obstacles to overcome in the kitchen to make a delicious meal. You have to be sure to use all the tasty ingredients in the right order. Give it a try and see if you can do it!
70010000119812.intro: Want to know how sandwiches are really made?
70010000119812.name: Run, Sandwich, Run!

70010000119931.description:
Clock Rogue is a roguelike action game that tests your sense of time.
Moves are set to specific times on a 12-second clock and must be activated by sharp timing using your internal clock.

Will you trust your sense of time and take risks for strong moves, or play it safe and advance cautiously? It's up to you!

◆A unique "time structure" combat system
- When you defeat an enemy, you'll get to choose from three moves to add to the clock.
- The stronger the move, the smaller its activation window.
- Consider each move's position carefully and build a clock that fits your playstyle.

◆Battling inside a hedgehog?!
- The game takes place within the body of a hedgehog.
- As Hari Cells, your goal is to protect the hedgehog from marauding viruses.

Build your own clock and protect the hedgehog!
70010000119931.intro: Are you confident in your internal clock?
70010000119931.name: Clock Rogue

70010000121030.description:
Death Run drops you into the world's most dangerous live broadcast: a high-stakes sci-fi game show where participants are thrown into merciless laser gauntlets and the only exit is the finish line. Watched by billions, judged by the millisecond, you are the latest contestant. The question isn't whether the show wants you dead — it does. The question is whether you're fast enough, sharp enough, and precise enough to make it out anyway.
At its core, Death Run is a 3D precision platformer built around fluid movement and split-second decision making. Courses are laced with moving lasers — rotating, sweeping, pulsing, and converging in patterns that demand full attention and quick adaptation. A single hit sends you back to the start. There are no checkpoints. There is only the run.
Your movement arsenal gives you the tools to survive: jump, double jump, upward dash, forward dash, float, and a momentum system that rewards players who keep moving forward without hesitation. Combining these fluidly is the difference between a clean run and a reset.
The game is built in levels, each taking one to two minutes to complete. Every five levels the action pauses for a story segment — expanding the dark, Squid Game-inspired narrative of the show, its hosts, its rules, and the world watching from the outside. The further you progress, the more the story peels back the layers of what this broadcast really is.
With a sleek neon-lit visual style, pounding atmosphere, and courses that escalate in complexity and speed, Death Run is a game about mastery. Each failed run teaches you something. Each completed run is earned.
70010000121030.intro: Dodge lethal lasers in a dark sci-fi death show — or die trying.
70010000121030.name: Death Run

70010000121384.description: Deliver mail as Catto, the town's dedicated Postcat, while meeting unique friends in a vibrant cozy town filled with kitty residents. As you explore the colorful town, encounter adorable residents and brighten up their day by helping them with silly little tasks.
70010000121384.name: Catto's Post Office

70010000122560.description:
Welcome to The Artifactory, a fast-paced couch co-op party game where teamwork, creativity, and a little factory chaos keep the production line moving.

Work together with up to four players to gather materials, craft items, and assemble loot boxes before the delivery trucks leave. Pass ingredients along conveyor belts, organize the production line, and keep the factory running smoothly.

But crafting isn’t just about following recipes. Experiment with different raw materials to discover new item combinations and unlock new ways to produce goods. The more you explore, the more efficient your factory can become.

Each level introduces new challenges — moving platforms, tricky conveyor layouts, and unpredictable obstacles that will test your coordination and communication.

Whether you are playing with friends, family, or going solo, every shift at the factory turns into a hilarious cooperative challenge where timing, teamwork, and quick thinking make all the difference.

Can your team master the machines and keep the deliveries on schedule?

Key Features
Local couch co-op for up to 4 players
Experiment with materials to discover new crafting recipes
Build and manage chaotic production lines
Creative factory environments with unique mechanics
Fast, cooperative party gameplay
Perfect for family game nights and multiplayer sessions
70010000122560.intro: Team up in a chaotic factory where crafting, experimentation, and fast teamwork keep the production line alive.
70010000122560.name: The Artifactory

70010000123585.description:
Move through 3D space to find hints, solve mysteries and escape from the room.
Anyone can play to the end because you can see hints and answers.
70010000123585.name: Escape game R00M14

70010000123974.description:
INCOMING BROADCAST
"Welcome to Rabbithole City, where all animals live a fulfilling life outside nature in this modern, neon-lit city - and it's all thanks to the mightiest species of all: bunnies! A few years ago, they brought us technological progress and a life of fun and pleasure. 

And the small price for such a life? Leaving your filthy natural habitat and your instincts behind. Especially you, carnivores, should change your ways if you want to be accepted in this glorious society. "


FREE THE OPRESSED
Not everyone agrees with the bunnies and many species are suffering under this strict rabbit regime.

You are recruited by a giant Owl who needs your help to sabotage the Bunny Tyranny. He gives you control over the body of a tiger-lynx, Kiyo, and sends you on various stealth and platforming missions to uncover the bunnies’ wicked plans. To avoid the merciless rabbit police, you'll need to make clever decisions about when to be stealthy or violent, or both. Hide in the dynamic shadows, use distractions, attacks, and ninja rope acrobatics, and don't get caught!


THE NIGHTLIFE IS CALLING
Take your time and get lost in the atmosphere of Rabbithole City. Learn more about life in this world, meet colorful characters, explore different locations, and discover how evil the bunnies really are.

Feel the seductive pull of the neon lights and immersive synth-wave beats, but be careful - do not lose sight of your mission.
70010000123974.intro: Kiyo, a feline ex-predator, is trapped in a neon-lit, dystopian city dominated by smartphone-addicted bunnies. Infiltrate the bunnies' facilities and free everyone from their tyrannical grip.
70010000123974.name: KIYO - Bunny Tyranny

70010000124397.description:
The world of legendary arcade games returns as a 3D puzzle!

■ How to Play

Simple controls. Just toss the Voxel-filled capsules into the playing field!
When two Voxels of the same kind collide, they transform into a larger one.
Keep them in the field—don't let them fall!


■ Immerse Yourself in Classic Titles with Dedicated Stages & Sounds

Alongside a main stage that blends elements from multiple titles, you can enjoy dedicated stages for these all-time classics:
'PAC-MAN', 'DIG DUG', 'XEVIOUS', 'MAPPY' and 'THE TOWER OF DRUAGA'!

Beyond just the visuals, the iconic music will take your gameplay to the next level!


■ Collect Over 100 Unique Voxels

Clear various challenges to keep unlocking new ones!
Build your favourite lineup and enjoy a fully customised experience!


■ Build Your Own Gallery

Showcase your collection in the "Collection Room".
Arrange them freely to recreate your favourite memories or build the ultimate crossover universe!


■ Aim for the Top in Score Attack!

Relive the thrill of carving your name into the arcade high score board.
Compete in online leaderboards against players worldwide to claim the top spot!


* This product is software for Nintendo Switch™.
* There is also a Nintendo Switch™ 2 version of this product. Please be careful to avoid duplicate purchases.
70010000124397.intro:
Classic pixel art meets 3D!
Namco’s iconic characters are reborn as "Voxels".
70010000124397.name: NAMCO LEGENDARY Mountains

70010000124614.description:
Live the life of an escaped worker, washed-up on a lawless station at the edge of an interstellar society. Inspired by the flexibility and freedom of Tabletop RPGs, explore the station, choose your friends, escape your past and change your future.

ABOUT THIS GAME
One of 2022’s most acclaimed indies, the Game Awards-nominated Citizen Sleeper is a Tabletop-inspired narrative RPG set on Erlin’s Eye, a ruined space station that is home to thousands of people trying to survive on the edges of an interstellar capitalist society.

You are a sleeper, a digitised human consciousness in an artificial body, owned by a corporation that wants you back. Thrust amongst the unfamiliar and colourful inhabitants of the Eye, you need to build friendships, earn your keep, and navigate the factions of this strange metropolis, if you hope to survive to see the next cycle.

ROLL THE DICE. DO THE WORK. GET PAID. SURVIVE.
Inspired by Tabletop Roleplaying games, Citizen Sleeper uses Dice, Clocks and Drives. Each cycle you use the dice you are dealt to choose what to do with your time. Make or break alliances, uncover truths and escape your hunters. Survive and ultimately thrive, one cycle at a time.

TURN UP FOR YOUR FRIENDS
The station plays host to characters from all walks of life, trying to eke out an existence among the stars. Salvagers, engineers, hackers, bartenders, street-food vendors, each has a history which brought them here. You choose which of them you wish to help, and together you will shape your future.

ACCESS THEIR SECRETS
Eventually, you will learn to use your dice to hack into the station’s cloud to access decades of digital data, uncover new areas and unlock secrets. This is your unique power, and with it you can change your future. Corporate secrets, rogue AIs and troves of lost data await those willing to dive into the depths of the station’s networks.

YOU WERE MADE TO DIE
Essen-Arp: to them you are just property, one more asset in a portfolio that stretches across the stars. You are the product of an abusive system, in a universe where humanity’s expansion is marked by exploitation and extraction. Escape the makers of your decaying body, and chart your own path in a richly imagined, deeply relevant sci-fi world which explores ideas of precarity, personhood and freedom.

THE COMPLETE EXPERIENCE
Citizen Sleeper now includes all three post-launch DLC episodes FLUX, REFUGE and PURGE, which expand the game and introduce additional characters and locations to Erlin’s Eye in an exciting new late game storyline.
70010000124614.intro: ROLEPLAYING IN THE RUINS OF INTERPLANETARY CAPITALISM
70010000124614.name: Citizen Sleeper – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000124786.description:
Enjoy an authentic crane game experience on Nintendo Switch™!
Take on realistic physics and a wide variety of stages!
In addition to standard crane claws, special machines featuring suction cups, hooks, chains, and water-based stages also appear!
Collect every prize and become a true crane game master!

【Free Play】
Challenge all 36 stages!
Clear a stage by collecting every prize!
Aim for a 3-star rating with the fastest clear times!

【Challenge】
Take on 6 stages in a row!
Compete for the fastest times and climb the global rankings!

【Collection Room】
Display and admire the prizes you've collected!
Create your very own original room!
70010000124786.intro: The hugely popular crane game series is back and better than ever! Aim, grab, and hook your prizes! Master a variety of crane arms and win tons of prizes!
70010000124786.name: Let's Aim! Crane Game

70010000125070.description:
Can you remember every detail of the handsome men who keep appearing?

"Wow, he was so cool! ...Wait, what was he wearing?"
"That smile was amazing! ...Did he have an earring?"
This isn't about admiring good looks — it's about noticing them.

This game is a 4-choice memory quiz where handsome characters flash before you and you must recall the tiny details.
In 60 seconds, commit hair colour, clothing, accessories, and background items to memory, then answer questions about the image after it has been masked.

How to play is simple.
・Look at the image and memorise every detail in 60 seconds
・When the image is hidden, answer the multiple-choice question
・Get it right and the original image is revealed

The frustration of "I didn't notice that!" and the satisfaction of "I remembered it!" will keep you coming back.
100 questions featuring 100 different handsome characters.

Play one question at a time and sharpen your observation and memory skills.

Can you catch every detail before it slips away?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
70010000125070.intro:
What colour was his tie again?
One glance is all you get.
70010000125070.name: Handsome Watching Face Memory Challenge

70010000125085.description:
A spot-the-difference style exploration horror game set in a mystical world of traditional Japanese streetscapes, evoking the dreamlike atmosphere of places like Gion.

As the player uncovers hidden “anomalies” lurking throughout the world, they gradually draw closer to the truth concealed beneath it all.

Will you be able to detect every abnormality hidden within this world?

●Story
Days that were never supposed to change.
So why am I here…?

A fox that causes anomalies, and strange beings that despise change.

In this world without allies,
“I” - the one who was somehow chosen -
must pursue the mystery through prayer and resolve.
70010000125085.intro:
A yokai that loathes change.
A fox that manipulates anomalies.
―In a world without allies, uncover the truth.
70010000125085.name: Gion Corridor:Re

70010000125505.description:
Prepare yourself to challenge your logic in an adventure deep in the heart of the desert, where every movement could be your last. In Sands and Relics, walking is just as dangerous as it is necessary, and every step changes the world beneath your feet.

Cross ancient ruins, explore fragile pathways, and uncover hidden relics in clever puzzles that blend strategy, planning, and that satisfying feeling of discovering the perfect solution. Here, the ground waits for no one. Sand tiles crack, collapse, and disappear as you move forward, turning the environment into a living puzzle.

Each level is a compact logic challenge where you must think before acting, calculate routes, and carefully decide where to step. Some surfaces can withstand more than one step, while others collapse immediately, and a single mistake can leave you trapped in the void.

As the journey continues, new mechanics make the puzzles even more creative, including teleporters, narrow paths, and combinations that demand full awareness of the environment. All of this comes wrapped in charming pixel art visuals that create a cosy atmosphere while keeping your mind engaged.

With 30 carefully crafted levels, simple controls, and the freedom to undo moves or restart whenever you want, Sands and Relics delivers an accessible, smart, and deeply satisfying experience for players who love strategic puzzles without time pressure.

Observe the terrain, plan your route, and discover whether your footsteps will be enough to reach the lost relic.
70010000125505.name: Sands and Relics

70010000125725.description:
Bus, train and toilet friendly puzzle game created to test your power of logic.

Complete each level by turning all the tiles to a single colour. 

All levels can be completed in 4 moves or less if you are skilled enough.

Good luck!!!


Features:

- 70 challenges to start, with more coming soon.
- Complete each level casually for a bronze or silver medal, or try and beat the game with all golds!
- Minimalistic visual and audio style.
- A Zen puzzling experience.
- Appropriate for all ages.
70010000125725.name: Full Colour Tiles

70010000125792.description:
The highly anticipated sequel to one of 2022’s most acclaimed RPGs!

You are a sleeper, an emulation of a human mind housed in an artificial body. You are on the run from the corporation that made you and the gang that seeks to control you. Commandeer a ship, build a network of crew and allies, and take on challenging contracts as you seek to build a future for yourself.

Choose a class, configure your skills and assemble your crew in unique tabletop-inspired gameplay. Your future depends on the roll of a dice, as you make difficult choices in a complex world. Reinventing the award-winning systems of Citizen Sleeper, this RPG will satisfy both fans of the original game and new players alike.

STAY AHEAD OF YOUR PAST
After a desperate attempt to free yourself from servitude by rewriting the very code that governs your system, you are on the run again, this time with a malfunctioning body, a price on your head and no memory of your past.

REBOOT / REBUILD / REPAIR
Citizen Sleeper’s revolutionary dice system returns, revised for the sequel. Manage your stress or take damage to your dice. Deal with glitches as they accrue in your system. Push yourself to get lucky and make this cycle count.

PUSH YOUR LUCK
Each character class now has a unique “Push” ability that can help you turn the tide of a difficult job or send you into a dangerous spiral depending on how and when you choose to use it. Reroll your dice to change your fate, or focus a single die to bet everything on a big success.

NAVIGATE THE BELT
Chart a course from hub to hub with complete freedom, taking on jobs and setting goals as you see fit. A living world, the Starward Belt rewards curiosity and care, but it's up to you to decide which locations and stories deserve your time and resources.

DO THE JOB, GET PAID
Contracts offer a new kind of focussed, tactical gameplay to the Citizen Sleeper experience. You’ll need to prepare carefully and choose the right approach for these multi-cycle, high-risk, high-reward jobs, but you’ll also have to react and adapt to both the roll of the dice and the twists and turns of each task.

CHOOSE YOUR FUTURE
Player choice is a massive part of the Citizen Sleeper experience, and the sequel deepens this with new skill checks that allow you to express your class and character in scenes, as well as branching storylines that will ask you to make hard choices. The future of your character is up to you.
70010000125792.name: Citizen Sleeper 2: Starward Vector – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000126609.description:
Curiosity leads you into the home of a famous vlogger, but escaping may be far more difficult than getting inside. When the doors lock behind you, survival becomes your only goal.

Explore dark rooms, search for useful items, unlock new areas, and solve escape-room style puzzles. Hidden passages, secret compartments, strange mechanisms, and mysterious clues reveal the story of the house and its owner.

Stay out of sight and avoid the vlogger at all costs. He reacts to noise, patrols the house, and can appear when you least expect it. Hide, move carefully, and use your surroundings to survive.

Experience a mix of exploration, stealth, puzzles, and tense chase sequences. Every item may help you solve a challenge or open a path forward.

Features:

• Survival horror with stealth gameplay
• Escape-room inspired puzzles and challenges
• Explore a mysterious house filled with secrets
• Search for items and unlock new areas
• Hide from a dangerous and unpredictable pursuer
• Atmospheric horror with touches of humour and satire
• Story-driven adventure with unusual characters
• Multiple ways to approach survival and escape

Can you uncover the vlogger's secrets and find a way out?
70010000126609.intro: Sneak into a famous vlogger's house, uncover his secrets, solve puzzles, and escape before he finds you.
70010000126609.name: Escape from Vlogger: Runaway

70010000126920.description:
This is a game where you can quickly learn fun world trivia through simple True/False quizzes.

How to play is easy：
・Read the question carefully.
・Choose whether the answer is True or False.
・If you answer correctly, you can read a detailed explanation.

No complicated controls or text input required!
Just pick one of two choices (True or False), so even if you don't know the answer, you can rely on your intuition and enjoy the game stress-free.

We have a massive variety of questions, covering not only geography and history, but politics and literature too!

・The capital of Finland is Helsinki.
・The convenience store was invented in Japan.
・Plato is the author of ""Apology of Socrates.""

...and much more!

Packed with trivia and general knowledge you'll want to brag about tomorrow.
A single playthrough only takes a few minutes, making it highly recommended for those looking for a quick brain workout during their commute or before bed.
70010000126920.intro:
"The Statue of Liberty is barefoot."← True or False!?
Acquire global trivia with a 2-choice quiz!
70010000126920.name: True or False THE WORLD

70010000126926.description:
Originally released in 1994 by Kure Software, this title is a real-time simulation game that takes the series' formula to the next level.

Following the tradition of its predecessors, players deploy their forces on a tactical map and engage in combat using the signature "Gochachara System," where numerous characters clash in real-time. This entry introduces a new dual-unit combat system, enabling advanced maneuvers like pincer attacks or summoning reinforcements to rescue allies in a pinch.

However, the same rules apply to your opponents—stay alert, as enemy reinforcements may arrive at any moment to turn the tide against you. The game features significant upgrades across both strategy and tactics, including a fatigue system that requires characters to rest to maintain peak performance, and the ability to hire mercenaries in towns.

While there are many characters to recruit, brute force alone will not carry you through. Success relies on meticulous unit composition and strategic march planning. Build your own unique squads and strategies from a diverse cast of characters, and experience the largest scenario and deepest systems in the series' history. This is a must-play for any simulation fan.
 
 *This application does not have a scene select mode.
 *The main game and gallery screen (*Gallery) are in Japanese version.
 *Other menu screens and "How to play" screens are in English.
 *Flashing lights or patterns may cause dizziness, spasms, or loss of consciousness. If you feel unwell, stop playing immediately and see a doctor.
   If you have a history of these symptoms, consult a physician before use.
70010000126926.intro: Control two squads at once?! Experience epic strategy on a whole new scale with all-new features like troop recruitment and fatigue mechanics.
70010000126926.name: EGGCONSOLE First Queen IV PC-9801

70010000127161.description:
You landed on this island with a relationship back home and zero intention of complicating things. Then the boys showed up.

Beautiful, bold, and completely unaware that you're supposed to be off limits. The problem is, so are they.

Work the island, build your reputation, and find yourself in situations you never saw coming. Dates that start as nothing and become something you don't have a name for yet. Late night chats that go places you didn't expect to go.

Every guy here pulls at something you didn't know was there, and the more time you spend with them, the harder it gets to look away. The in-game chat keeps you close even when you're apart. And on an island this small, distance doesn't fix anything.

A guy who goes after what he wants and doesn't hide it, one who acts untouchable until he isn't, a reckless one who makes bad decisions feel like the only option... None of them are asking you to choose. Not yet.

Someone is waiting for you. The island doesn't care.


Features:

● ISLAND JOBS & SKILL PROGRESSION: Build your life on the island and open doors you weren't supposed to open.

● DATES YOU WEREN'T SUPPOSED TO GO ON: Hidden coves, rooftop bars, late nights by the water. Every date is a line you're crossing.

● IN-GAME CHAT SYSTEM: Keep the conversations going. The ones back home, and the ones that are getting complicated.

● EXCLUSIVE GALLERY IMAGES: The further you go, the more unlocks. Some things can't be unseen.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: You can stay faithful. You can fall. You can burn everything down. The choice is yours.

● 30 DAYS ON THE ISLAND: The summer has an expiration date. Every day you waste is a door that closes forever.


Someone at home is waiting for you.
The boys on this island are not waiting for anyone.
How long can you hold out?
70010000127161.intro:
You have someone waiting at home.
But the island doesn't know that, and neither do they.
70010000127161.name: Love Island: Forbidden Boys Temptation

70010000127447.description:
Enjoy a learning quiz game based on Japanese words and phrases often seen in everyday outings and travel situations.

Answer questions about transport, sightseeing, food, signs, and daily conversation in a simple quiz format that is easy to start.

How to play:
・Read the question
・Choose the answer from the options
・Keep going and check your Japanese knowledge

No complicated controls are needed, so beginners can jump in right away.
Each question can be played at a smooth pace, making it great for short breaks, daily vocabulary practice, or relaxed solo play.

Recommended for:
・Players learning Japanese
・Anyone who enjoys word quizzes
・Families who want to play and learn together
・Players looking for a light brain-training game

Play alone at your own pace, or talk through the answers with family and friends.
Enjoy Japanese words and phrases with the feeling of a little outing!
70010000127447.intro:
Take a Japanese quiz on the go!
Practice signs, transport, food, and daily phrases
Build vocabulary in quick play sessions
70010000127447.name: Phrase Passport Japan A Travel Japanese Quiz

70010000128030.description:
Turn mixed-up photo panels and complete bright, summer-themed pictures in this casual rotation puzzle.

Look closely at each panel, find how the image connects, and rotate the pieces until the full photo comes together.

How to play:
・Check the direction of each photo panel
・Select panels that are facing the wrong way
・Rotate them to complete the picture

The rules are simple and easy to understand, making it a good choice for short breaks, relaxed solo play, or playing together with family and friends.

If you get stuck, the hint feature helps you keep going, so even puzzle beginners can enjoy each stage at their own pace.

Complete sunny resort-style photos one by one and enjoy a light puzzle experience that tests your observation skills!
70010000128030.intro:
Rotate each photo into place!
A relaxing summer puzzle for quick play
Enjoy solo or solve together with friends
70010000128030.name: Resort Beauties: HENTAI Photo Puzzle

70010000128360.description:
William James Magnus III has been murdered, and you’re the only one with the investigative know-how to interrogate the other passengers and find the true culprit. But, with the train barreling towards the station, you only have so much time to solve the case before the murderer gets away.

Framed as a classic choose-your-own-adventure novel, Murder on the Disorient Express takes the best aspects of your favorite mystery novels and adds an interactive twist. Choose who you speak to, what you investigate, collect evidence, and make your final deduction based on limited information. Choose wisely, or the culprit will get off scot-free.

With only so many possible conversations to have and options to explore, Murder on the Disorient Express can’t be fully experienced in one playthrough. Take different paths and follow different leads to get a complete view of the events in additional playthroughs.

Talk with a cast of colorful characters, collect clues, and manage your time to seek out over a dozen possible endings. Unlock them all to see the full story.
70010000128360.intro:
An interactive murder mystery on the world famous train!
Step into the role of a cunning detective tasked with solving a perplexing murder before time runs out.
70010000128360.name: Murder on the Disorient Express

70010000128477.description:
Is your "common sense" really up to global standards?

Which one is the Nile? Who built the pyramids? What's the largest planet in our solar system?
You should know these — but when asked, the answer slips away.
How far does your knowledge really reach?

This game serves up 50 visual quiz questions across 8 categories: nature, geography, astronomy, science, history, sports, food, and art & culture — all rooted in worldwide common sense.

Read the question, then choose the correct answer from 4 images.
"Oh, I know this!" or "Wait, which one is it?"
Compare and decide — a 4-choice visual quiz.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question
・Pick the correct answer from 4 images
・Stuck? Open the hint for a clue
・After answering, learn more from the detailed explanation

Get it right and feel great. Miss it and learn something new.
By question 50, the world feels a little closer.

Squeeze in a quick brain refresh on your commute, on a break, or before bed.
Perfect for sparking "Did you know?" conversations with family and friends.

So — can you make the cut?
Take on the worldwide common sense challenge.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
70010000128477.intro:
Could you hold your own anywhere in the world?
The global common sense every grown-up should know.
70010000128477.name: Can You Make the Cut? Worldwide Common Sense Check

70010000129433.description:
A new cozy musical adventure is waiting to be discovered!

Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra 2 is the sequel to the charming hidden object game Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra. This time, finding the cats is only the beginning: their instruments are hiding too!

Explore 10 delightful levels filled with cute details and carefully hidden surprises. Search every corner to find the cats and their instruments, then complete each musical pair to bring the orchestra back together.

Each level also hides a special key. Find it to open a treasure chest, reveal a hidden instrument, and discover the shyest cat of them all.

With 32 hidden objects in every level, Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra 2 offers a relaxing search filled with charming discoveries, musical rewards, and plenty of adorable cats.
70010000129433.intro: Find the cats. Discover the instruments. Reunite the orchestra!
70010000129433.name: Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra 2

70050000070125.description:
This DLC unlocks a brand new world for hexceed: Centaurus! 
Puzzle your way through 140 brand-new levels!
70050000070125.intro: Unlocks a new world for hexceed: Centaurus brings 140 new puzzles and includes all mechanics from the previous DLC.
70050000070125.name: Centaurus

70050000070553.description:
Between Worlds
Not all places are meant to be destinations. The Train Station is a place of arrivals, departures, and fleeting encounters. Mortals pass through, never feeling safe, as though they are being watched. Platforms fade into the darkness. The tunnels echo with distant sounds from the past and the present. Panic spreads faster than the Phantom Train Conductor can operate his locomotive.

Introducing a new Train Station level built upon crowds, open spaces, and relentless motion. No place ever feels secure.

Introducing a new game mode: Second Side of the Coin.

For the first time, step into the role of a Ghost-breaker who hunts ghosts, sets traps, and experiences fear from the other side—where control is fleeting and fragile, resources are limited, and every mistake means punishment.
70050000070553.name: Between Worlds

70050000072125.description:
Expand your garage with the RACE - Razor Pack!

Razor is a heavy Gunner-class combat monster truck built for explosive arena racing. With massive tires, armored bodywork, and mounted weapons, it is ready to crush rivals and tear through post-apocalyptic tracks.

Its ultimate ability, Judgment Day, increases the damage of rocket attacks when activated, giving Razor extra firepower in combat.

This DLC includes:
- Razor car
- 6 vinyls
- 6 flags
- 4 avatars

Vinyls and flags can be used on any unlocked car.
70050000072125.intro: Unlock the Razor car and exclusive customization items.
70050000072125.name: RACE - Razor Pack
